texto: Books are like Tarot decks. They provide answers and guidance but more importantly, they are doorways and portals to the otherworld and the imagination. They leave their imprint and keep whispering to us long after we close the pages or shuffle the deck.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sasha Graham: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a espiritualidade. O trecho “Books are like Tarot decks. They provide answers and guidance but more importantly, they are door…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que espiritualidade, books, divination pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de divination e fortune-telling.

frase_original: Books are like Tarot decks. They provide answers and guidance but more importantly, they are doorways and portals to the otherworld and the imagination. They leave their imprint and keep whispering to us long after we close the pages or shuffle the deck.

texto: I hope you find your truth and when you do, you stand in the middle of it strong, beautiful and nimble like the World dancer. Because when the Fool followed her own path and trusted herself, she found herself in the World. And by the time she did, she was so high on the music-so enraptured by the dancing, so lost in the beauty, so in tune with herself, and so filled with magic-she didn't even realize she's arrived at her destination.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sasha Graham: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I hope you find your truth and when you do, you stand in the middle of it strong, beautiful and n…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, empowerment, fortune-telling pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fortune-telling e intuition.

frase_original: I hope you find your truth and when you do, you stand in the middle of it strong, beautiful and nimble like the World dancer. Because when the Fool followed her own path and trusted herself, she found herself in the World. And by the time she did, she was so high on the music-so enraptured by the dancing, so lost in the beauty, so in tune with herself, and so filled with magic-she didn't even realize she's arrived at her destination.
